description: Independent SOURCE-derived text-only module allow-list from a bounded meta-device construction of the admitted Qwen3_5MoeForCausalLM class (no weights, no GPU, no memory: torch.device('meta'); reduced layer/expert counts, expanded over the frozen schedule). This is the source side of corrected-composition item 2, replacing the earlier self-bound admitted==admitted comparison. Aggregate-only: counts, template sizes, and public module-structure facts; no tensor values, no local paths.

real_structure_findings.deltanet_projection_path: model.layers.{i}.linear_attn.{in_proj_qkv,in_proj_z,in_proj_a,in_proj_b,out_proj} (NOT self_attn); linear layers also carry linear_attn.{A_log,conv1d,dt_bias,norm}
real_structure_findings.routed_experts_source_representation: PACKED per layer: mlp.experts.gate_up_proj + mlp.experts.down_proj (module count independent of num_experts)
real_structure_findings.routed_experts_artifact_representation: the GPTQ weight index enumerates NUMBERED per-expert tensors (~124611 tensors / ~32285 canonical module paths)
real_structure_findings.supersedes: the hardcoded self_attn projection paths + numbered-expert assumption in the earlier synthetic q35q_source_admission validator; the live composition must use this meta-derived allow-list

remaining_blockers.packed_numbered_expert_reconciliation: the source packed expert modules (mlp.experts.gate_up_proj/down_proj) must be mapped to the artifact's numbered per-expert tensors under a frozen representation map before requiring source<->artifact module-set equality
remaining_blockers.corrected_non_self_bound_tokenizer_and_s: expected tokenizer values + source commit/file identity from independent immutable provenance vs observed runtime
remaining_blockers.final_overall_conjunction: one production path + integration tests that fail on self-binding
remaining_blockers.weight_staging: full shard payload staging remains prohibited until every independent prerequisite passes

privacy: aggregate-only; no tensor values, weights, caches, or local paths
